_last_updated: 2026-05-09 (orphan cleanup pass — removed 3 endpoints, dropped 4 tables)

_classification_rules.wired: Full loop confirmed: automated writer, automated reader, automated action. No manual step required.
_classification_rules.partial: Consumer exists and reads, but a human must close the loop — or the consumer exists but is currently suspended/paused.
_classification_rules.orphaned: No active consumer. Data is written or capability exists but nothing reads or calls it.
_classification_rules.consumer_unknown: Intended consumer not confirmed from code review. Surfaces for Bill's decision.

endpoints.notes: Called by Anvil dashboard on load.
Called by Anvil Lessons tab.
Called by LEAN_BOOT step 11 at every session start.
Called by LEAN_BOOT step 6.
Called by close-session to increment times_applied on lessons used.
Active workflow, Mon/Wed/Fri 15:00 UTC schedule.
Active workflow, Sunday 14:00 UTC schedule.
Called by research_synthesis_agent to window corpus before synthesis.
Called by Anvil Artifacts tab.
Called when thread entries are added with embed=True.
Called by auto_cycle grader path during card execution.
Called synchronously by annotate() when an annotation is filed.
Triggered by classify_annotation result when intent=correction|gap, confidence >= 0.8.
Called by Fleet tab Comment work button.
Active workflow but has run only once (2026-04-05). Biweekly cadence unconfirmed.

behavioral_health_check is paused/sandbox; never activated in production.
resource_scout_reddit workflow is paused.
session_report_agent workflow is paused.
Maintenance/one-time endpoint. No scheduled caller; manual use only.
Brave Search API key provisioned, endpoint live and tested. Zero active callers. Intended for research agents and thread search — not yet wired.
Fetches and extracts text from a URL. No confirmed active n8n workflow or callable caller found.

Thread watch cycle runner. Caller not confirmed — may be triggered by check_watch_threads.

Grades a research cycle run. Caller not confirmed from code review.
Research cycle orchestrator. No confirmed active caller found.
Capability curation scan. No confirmed active caller found. May be manually triggered.

tables.name: lessons_learned
tables.notes: Core memory store. Full loop confirmed: written at session close, read at session start.

tables.name: thread_entries
tables.notes: Anvil Threads tab reads and displays. Full loop within the thread research workflow.

tables.name: inquiry_threads
tables.notes: Thread container. Anvil Threads tab is primary consumer.

tables.name: boot_briefings
tables.notes: Anvil Sessions tab reads via get_boot_briefings callable. Read path confirmed.

tables.name: agent_artifacts
tables.notes: Session health reporter writes after each Sentinel session. Anvil Artifacts tab reads.

tables.name: agent_feedback
tables.notes: Classification fires automatically. But the attention queue requires Bill to manually review and close the loop. Items accumulated to 11 before the last manual clear.

tables.name: audit_log
tables.notes: Written constantly. Surfaced in Anvil but no automated action fires on audit entries.

tables.name: experimental_outputs
tables.notes: Surfaced in Anvil Artifacts tab. Requires manual review to act on. No automated downstream consumer.

tables.name: grader_reviews
tables.notes: Grader writes; Anvil surfaces for Bill review. Grader pause/fail requires a manual session to address — no automated retry or escalation.

tables.name: work_queue
tables.notes: Reader (sentinel) exists but is suspended in lean mode. 1 agent_build task has been pending since 2026-05-03 — unclaimed.

tables.name: capabilities
tables.notes: Anvil Fleet tab surfaces capabilities. The write-side caller (/run_capability_curation_scan) has no confirmed active scheduler — see endpoint entry.

tables.name: research_articles
tables.notes: Anvil Research tab reads. Original writer (context_engineering_research) is retired; thread gather is the current write path. The rating/comment/status columns exist for Bill review but no automated action fires on status changes.

tables.name: research_papers
tables.notes: arxiv_aadp_pipeline writes here. No Anvil callable confirmed to read research_papers specifically. get_table_rows is generic and could read it manually. Not the same table as research_articles.

tables.name: external_api_usage
tables.notes: Written on every Brave/web call. No Anvil callable or stats server endpoint confirmed to read this table.

tables.name: retrieval_log
tables.notes: inject_context_v3 logs what was retrieved each session. No confirmed reader. Could feed lesson utilization analytics but nothing currently consumes it.

tables.name: resources
tables.notes: Both writers are paused. No Anvil callable confirmed to read this table.

tables.name: feedback_log
tables.notes: feedback_agent is paused. 78 rows accumulated. No confirmed reader found.

tables.name: refinements
tables.notes: feedback_agent is paused. No confirmed reader found.

tables.name: inbox
tables.notes: Read path exists in Anvil (approve/deny callables). Writer is unclear — no active agent or endpoint confirmed to write here currently.

tables.name: ideas
tables.notes: MCP tools read/write. No Anvil surface confirmed. Not clear whether Bill can see ideas without running idea_list in a Claude Code session.

agents.notes: Write path to work_queue is wired. Consumer (sentinel) is suspended in lean mode — commands queue but are not executed until lean mode ends.
Fires after Sentinel sessions. Artifacts are immediately readable in Anvil and GitHub.
ChromaDB output feeds research_synthesis (wired loop). research_papers Supabase output has no confirmed reader. Telegram is Bill-review only.
Synthesizes corpus weekly and notifies Bill. No automated downstream action on synthesis findings.

agents.output_destination: experimental_outputs + Telegram alert if issues found
agents.notes: Alerts Bill when agents need retirement. Action on the alert is manual — no automated retirement trigger.

agents.output_destination: experimental_outputs + work_queue items (for implement decisions) + Telegram digest
agents.notes: Has run once. work_queue items require sentinel to claim them. Sentinel suspended in lean mode.
Informational Telegram message. Bill is the terminal consumer; no automated downstream action.

agents.output_destination: enriched task payload returned to caller
agents.notes: Designed to enrich tasks before claude -p execution. Consumer (sentinel) is suspended in lean mode — effectively idle during lean sessions.
Built and tested in sandbox. Never activated in production. No scheduled caller and no consumer of its output identified.
Paused. Evaluation scores written to experimental_outputs but no automated downstream action on scores.
